summary: Project for ONEDOT DIGITAL brand, updating logo in a draft with the ONEDOT DIGITAL logo (dark navy text with blue circle accent on 'O' in DOT, 'DIGITAL' in grey).
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- ONEDOT DIGITAL wordmark logo on a transparent background: bold dark navy uppercase 'ONEDOT' text where the 'O' in DOT is replaced by a blue circle ring accent, with 'DIGITAL' in medium-weight grey beneath it (onedot-digital-logo.dim_400x200.png)

existing_features.title: Replace the current logo image used in the TopNav, HeroSection, and Footer with the newly generated ONEDOT DIGITAL logo asset (onedot-digital-logo.dim_400x200.png) stored in frontend/public/assets/generated.
